content.name: datalink
content.description: Connects the GCS to the aircraft and vice-versa, exposing ROS messages

config_entries.name: sysid
config_entries.description: MAVLink System ID to start up with. Must be between 0 and 255. Usually 1 for aircraft, 190 for ground station.

config_entries.name: compid
config_entries.description: MAVLink Component ID to start up with. Must be between 0 and 255 and unique among all other components on the same system.

config_entries.name: connection_url
config_entries.description: URL for MAVLink to connect to. Can be tcp://[ip]:[port], udp://[ip]:port, or serial:///[device-file]:[baudrate]

config_entries.name: targetsysid
config_entries.description: MAVLink System ID to send packets to. Must be between 0 and 255. Usually 1 for aircraft, 190 for ground station.

config_entries.name: targetcompid
config_entries.description: MAVLink Component ID to send packets to. Must be between 0 and 255 and unique among all other components on the same system.

config_entries.name: autopilot_telemetry
config_entries.description: Whether or not to listen to MAVLink messages containing information that some nodes may need and serialize them on ROS. Generally true for the copilot and false for the ground.

config_entries.name: publish_system_status
config_entries.description: If true, listen for system status messages over MAVLink and serialize them onto ROS. If false, Listen for system status messages over ROS and serialize them onto MAVLink. Generally true for the ground station and false for the copilot.

config_entries.name: extra_config_directory
config_entries.description: Direcory where the local copies of mountpoints.json and systems.json can be found. Should generally be [workspace]/src/stardos_datalink/files.

errors.name: cannot_create_outdir
errors.description: The program cannot create the directory to place the pictures.

errors.name: fs_full
errors.description: The filesystem to copy to is full.
